{{Infobox character
| name = Reigan Shen
| aliases = Reigan
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Path of the King’s Key]], control over an extra-spatial vault}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|, mastery over spatial travel, spatial transfer artifact}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|, teleportation anchor}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|, Striker technique of sword madra, [[soulfire]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|, [[hunger madra]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|, [[King’s Key madra]], [[spirit-sense|spiritual sense]]}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Monarch]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|, Emperor of Lions, Monarch of the Rosegold continent, [[Uncrowned King]], conqueror, Monarch of the King’s Key}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Dreadgod cults]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|, [[Ninecloud Court]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|, [[House Gray]], [[House Shen]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Soulsmith]]}}
| birthplace = {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|western plains of the Rosegold continent}}
| residence = {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Rosegold]], palace}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Underlord (novel)|Underlord]]
}}

''See also: [[Reigan Shen Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Reigan [[Shen]] is the [[Monarch]] of the [[Rosegold continent]] and the Emperor of Lions. A creature of immense ambition, he rose from humble beginnings to become a powerful leader by winning the inaugural [[Uncrowned King Tournament{{!}}Uncrowned King tournament]]. He is the creator and sole practitioner of the [[King’s Key]], a unique [[Path]] involving spatial [[Authority{{!}}authority]] that allows him to access an extra-[[spatial vault]] for storing weapons, techniques, and enemies. This power stems from a [[Sage’s Remnant]] he bonded with during his youth. As a leader, [[Shen]] has successfully unified various factions under his banner, including the cults of the four [[Dreadgods]], [[Redmoon Hall]], [[Abyssal Palace]], the [[Silent Servants]], and the [[Stormcallers]]. He is known for his regal bearing, often appearing with a white-gold mane of hair and beard, reflecting his lion-like nature. Throughout his life, he has sought to control the [[Dreadgods]] and expand his influence, though he has faced significant challenges from other [[Monarchs]] and the shifting tides of [[Fate{{!}}fate]]. Despite his immense power and mastery over spatial travel, he has experienced moments of profound fear and loss, including the death of his mentor. He is also noted for his ability to craft specialized weapons and spatial treasures, such as teleportation anchors.}}

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Reigan Shen]] won the [[tournament]] and became a [[Monarch]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c12">''Underlord'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Reigan Shen]] has recruited various groups to his cause.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c22">''Underlord'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">14</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Reigan Shen]] is the Emperor of Lions and [[Monarch]] of the [[Rosegold continent]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10">''Uncrowned'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Reigan Shen]] is the creator of the [[Path of the King’s Key]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c11">''Uncrowned'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Reigan Shen]] has gold-tinged white hair and a beard that blends into a white-gold mane.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Reigan Shen]] is working with the [[Dragon King]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15">''Uncrowned'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Reigan Shen]] bonded with a [[Sage]]'s [[Remnant]] that had command over space when he was a [[Jade]] cub.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Reigan Shen]]'s [[Path]] involves control over an extra-[[spatial vault]] used to store weapons, techniques, and enemies.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Reigan Shen]] was born to a pride of regal white lions on the western plains of the [[Rosegold continent]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Reigan Shen]] reached [[Underlord]] before he turned twenty years old.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Reigan Shen]] was the victor of the first [[Uncrowned King Tournament{{!}}Uncrowned King tournament]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Reigan Shen]] is known as a conqueror, glory-seeker, imperialist, and daring innovator.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Reigan Shen]] promised the four [[Dreadgod cults]] that he would awaken their masters.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Reigan Shen]] is a person mentioned by [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c17">''Uncrowned'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Reigan Shen]] is the [[Monarch]] of the [[King’s Key]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18">''Uncrowned'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Reigan Shen]] lounges on the roof of his palace.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c21">''Uncrowned'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">29</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Reigan Shen]] is a powerfully built man with a white-gold mane of hair and beard.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2">''Wintersteel'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Reigan Shen]]'s invasion was prevented by [[Northstrider]]'s support of [[Malice]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Reigan Shen]] and his entire pedestal sank into the floor.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Reigan Shen{{!}}Reigan]] could not threaten [[Eithan]] directly due to his protection.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4">''Wintersteel'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Therian Nills]] is a chosen of [[Reigan Shen]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5">''Wintersteel'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Reigan Shen]] has a chance at [[Penance]] if [[Ziel of the Wasteland{{!}}Ziel]] loses.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Reigan Shen]] wishes for the [[Dreadgods]] to invade the [[Blackflame Empire]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Reigan Shen]] is involved in the [[Uncrowned King Tournament{{!}}Uncrowned tournament]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6">''Wintersteel'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] is the chosen of [[Reigan Shen]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Reigan Shen]] has three [[Monarchs]] chosen from the [[Dreadgod cults]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Dreadgod cultists]]' signature would be the white of [[Reigan Shen]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Reigan Shen]] once delivered a blow to [[Cladia]] that made her vanish from [[Eithan]]'s senses.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8">''Wintersteel'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Reigan Shen]] is a [[Monarch]] whom [[Min Shuei]] appealed to.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11">''Wintersteel'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Reigan Shen]] is someone the competitors aim to prove their value to.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14">''Wintersteel'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Ninecloud Court]] supports [[Reigan Shen]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Reigan Shen]] paid for [[Eithan]]'s expensive clothes.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c15">''Wintersteel'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Reigan Shen]] may have gifted [[Calan Archer]] a [[spatial transfer]] artifact.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17">''Wintersteel'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Reigan Shen]] created a [[cloudship]] that can withstand attacks from anyone short of a [[Sage]] or a [[Herald]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19">''Wintersteel'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Reigan Shen]] is a missing provider of one of the seven prizes.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Reigan Shen]] gave [[Sopharanatoth{{!}}Sophara]] a clay doll that assists with form shifting.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c20">''Wintersteel'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Reigan Shen]] is a [[Monarch]] who was sipping wine.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21">''Wintersteel'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Reigan Shen]] is the person [[Yan Shoumei]] is chosen by.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Reigan Shen]] watched from his viewing platform.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c22">''Wintersteel'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Reigan Shen]] told the [[Blood Sage]] to ready themselves.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26">''Wintersteel'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Reigan Shen]] has mastery over spatial travel.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Reigan Shen]] promised to sponsor [[Eithan]]'s [[advancement]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Reigan Shen]] sent the group that ambushed [[Mercy]] and [[Akura Pride{{!}}Pride]], offering to extend [[Seishen Daji{{!}}Daji]]'s life in exchange for joining the attack.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Reigan Shen]] is [[binding]] the [[Dreadgod]] factions together.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28">''Wintersteel'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Reigan Shen]] began to tear open a [[portal]] from the heart of a mountain.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Reigan Shen]] is suspected of being behind the attack.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c3">''Bloodline'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Reigan Shen]] is a person the [[Wei Patriarch]] of [[Lindon]]'s memories gave a similar impression to.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c11">''Bloodline'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Reigan Shen]] is a person that could potentially push past [[Northstrider]] if carried.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17">''Bloodline'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Reigan Shen]] made a specific teleportation anchor.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18">''Bloodline'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Reigan Shen]] feels as weak as an [[Iron]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c21">''Bloodline'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">51</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] is deep in [[labyrinth{{!}}the labyrinth]] and uses a [[drudge]] for his mission.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c2">''Reaper'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] is looking for ways deeper into [[labyrinth{{!}}the labyrinth]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] moved [[The Phoenix{{!}}the Phoenix]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] uses a [[sword]] that blazes like the sun.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7">''Reaper'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] coughed up [[blood]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8">''Reaper'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] wears a human form like a cloak.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] seized the [[Blood Core]] and placed it in a silver rectangular case.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] carries a silver flask on his belt.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] uses a [[construct]] at his belt that emanates blue strands of energy to support him in flight.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] used a flight [[construct]] to travel.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] is a person who might value the [[ivory box]] as a [[Soulsmithing]] tool.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c14">''Reaper'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] is approaching the group.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] carries two swords, one large and orange, and one thin as a [[needle]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c16">''Reaper'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] has a lens covering his left eye.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] raised his [[sword]] toward [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] was targeted by a rain of stars called by [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17">''Reaper'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]]'s eyes flash gold.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] is cut off from his supply of weapons.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] is a [[Monarch]] who desires weapons.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] wants [[Cradle]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] sees the [[Dreadgods]] as a way to take [[Cradle]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] is notorious for playing with his prey.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c18">''Reaper'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] is someone [[Lindon]] might have to confront again.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19">''Reaper'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] had a death trident consisting of two broken halves.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Subject One]] welcomed [[Reigan Shen]] with open arms.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Subject One]] chose [[Reigan Shen]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c20">''Reaper'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] is the patron of the [[Dreadgod cults]] in the [[Uncrowned King Tournament{{!}}Uncrowned King tournament]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] carries loot perfect for any [[Soulsmith]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c21">''Reaper'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] is believed to have slain the beast.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c22">''Reaper'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] called for [[Wei Shi Lindon Arelius]] to have a seat.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] is a [[Monarch]] who can pull a golden chair out of thin air.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23">''Reaper'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] is a [[Monarch]] who rules over an ancient and ruined kingdom.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] possesses an axe of weathered [[stone]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]]'s [[Spiritual pressure{{!}}spiritual pressure]] is comparable to a [[Herald]], but he is spiritually weaker.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] possesses [[Tiberian Arelius’s Remnant{{!}}Tiberian Arelius’ Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] uses a [[Striker technique]] of [[sword madra]] from an [[Archlord weapon]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] is the sole [[Monarch]] of the [[Rosegold continent]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] wants the [[Dreadgods]], the [[Monarchs]], their people, and their [[Remnants]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] uses a [[Forged]] silver shield.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] absorbed the [[Soulsmith inheritance]] of [[Ozmanthus Arelius]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] holds the [[core binding]] of [[Subject One]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] possesses a lion form.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24">''Reaper'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] possesses [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] and his [[Sages]] had their spirits unveiled.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25">''Reaper'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] arranged something within [[labyrinth{{!}}the labyrinth]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] hired the [[The Eight-Man Empire{{!}}Eight-Man Empire]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Something happened with [[Reigan Shen]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] ejected [[Reigan Shen]]'s forces from the valley.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] has no skill at reading [[Fate]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26">''Reaper'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] is a man who reacts to the arrival of the [[Reaper]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] realized he had slain [[Eithan]]'s descendants.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c27">''Reaper'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">10</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Reigan Shen]] may have obtained some prototype arrowheads.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c2">''Dreadgod'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Reigan Shen]] can change his resources at any time.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Reigan Shen]] is the [[Lion Monarch]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c4">''Dreadgod'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Reigan Shen]] wears silver-and-gold armor and uses [[Monarch]]-level launchers.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Reigan Shen]] possesses [[hunger madra]] that was sealed in a scripted and space-locked container.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Malice]] compares the [[Silent King]] to [[Reigan Shen]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18">''Dreadgod'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Reigan Shen]] is a lion taking on the tiger's share of the burden.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19">''Dreadgod'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Reigan Shen]] hovered nearby watching the battle.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Reigan Shen]] had a first collection of relics.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21">''Dreadgod'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Reigan Shen]] has an isolated space that resembles his treasure vaults.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22">''Dreadgod'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">39</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]]'s signet [[ring]] represents wealth and command over space.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2">''Waybound'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] does not perform his own [[Soulsmithing]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c4">''Waybound'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] uses gold-edged portals to unleash [[Striker techniques]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c5">''Waybound'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] uses four shields that orbit him.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] uses a [[King’s Key]] to call out defenses.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen{{!}}Reigan]] can drag out time for a human spent outside of the [[pocket world]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] had driven off [[Reigan Shen]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6">''Waybound'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] stays away out of fear of the [[Ancient Bow of the Soulseeker{{!}}Silent King Bow]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] returned to a [[spatial anchor]] just outside of [[Moongrave]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9">''Waybound'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] was struck by a bar of liquid flame.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] used a trio of blue-and-green metal claws.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] is capable of blowing [[Sacred Valley]] to ashes.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]]'s vaults were torn apart by the [[technique]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] was struck by a projection of [[Ozmanthus Arelius{{!}}Ozmanthus]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10">''Waybound'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]]'s [[hunger]] echoes were used to fend off [[Striker techniques]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c11">''Waybound'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] was approaching [[Windfall]] using [[Path of the King’s Key{{!}}King's Key]] [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12">''Waybound'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] remembers [[Reigan Shen]]'s face from [[labyrinth{{!}}the labyrinth]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] found the location/group.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] used a whip made of [[life madra]] to shred a plague-[[spirit]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13">''Waybound'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] is one of [[Yerin]]'s targets.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] gifted [[Yerin]] her wings.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c16">''Waybound'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Ancient Bow of the Soulseeker{{!}}Silent King Bow]] is worthy of [[Reigan Shen]]'s collection.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21">''Waybound'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen{{!}}Reigan]] is a character who can use [[spirit-sense{{!}}spiritual sense]] to perceive the agony of a [[Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c22">''Waybound'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen{{!}}Reigan]] has the ability to expand a [[Remnant]]'s physical form for inspection.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] is the full name of [[Reigan Shen{{!}}Reigan]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] helped to seal [[Emriss Silentborn]] away.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24">''Waybound'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] carries the [[Horn of the Slumbering Wraith]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] has [[Authority{{!}}authority]] over the [[core binding]] of the [[Slumbering Wraith]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] explored [[labyrinth{{!}}the labyrinth]] and extracted its [[binding]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] lowered the [[binding]] of [[Subject One]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c25">''Waybound'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]]'s home is [[Rosegold]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27">''Waybound'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] has a territory to the south.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] uses a two-handed [[sword]] that runs with [[blood]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] pounced on [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] uses [[hunger madra]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c28">''Waybound'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] is working with [[Luminous Queen Sha Miara{{!}}Sha Miara]] to protect [[Rosegold]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c28" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] was facing down three additional [[Monarchs]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30">''Waybound'', chapter 30</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] was building a home.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] possesses [[King’s Key madra]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c37">''Waybound'', chapter 37</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">23</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]] witnessed [[Monarchs]] battling the [[Wandering Titan]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]] swallowed a [[Sage]]'s [[spirit]] during his [[advancement]] to [[Gold]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]] possesses a [[Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]] is a character who possesses the [[Path]] of the [[Path of the King’s Key{{!}}King's Key]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]] is an [[Underlord]] of the [[Rosegold plains]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]] is a member of [[House Gray]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]] has a [[Sage]]'s [[Remnant]] bonded to him.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]] can move space intuitively.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]] is a member of a species that has natural gifts and [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]] is of [[House Gray]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]] is one of the eight [[Uncrowned]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]]'s [[advancement]] to [[Underlord]] was aided by the elders of his kind and shared bloodline power.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]] is a fighter who was not favored to win his match against [[Tiberian Arelius{{!}}Tiberian]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]] has a more powerful body and [[soul]] in terms of [[madra]] potency than [[Tiberian Arelius{{!}}Tiberian]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]] advanced to the Overlord stage during the [[tournament]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]] is an Overlord.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]] is a member of [[House Shen]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]] is an Overlord and a sacred lion.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]] competed in the first [[Uncrowned King Tournament{{!}}Uncrowned King tournament]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]] is described as [[Eithan]]'s family's killer.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c2">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]] is currently weakened.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]] fought in the first [[Uncrowned King Tournament{{!}}Uncrowned King tournament]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]] is planning to assassinate [[Lindon]]'s friends.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c14">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|“I doubt Reigan Shen is burned at all by our tenacity,” Eithan said, and Veris paled.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c17" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“Victory,” the Ninecloud Soul announced, “to Yan Shoumei of Redmoon Hall, chosen of Reigan Shen.”<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“It can be hard for some of us to keep our impulses in check,” Reigan Shen said, sipping his glass of wine.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Reigan Shen turned to the Blood Sage. “Ready yourself,” he said.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“The dragon is the obvious target, but then Reigan Shen is the one binding the Dreadgod factions together.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
